title: TelemetrySnapshotPayload v1
description: Engine-status telemetry snapshot; wrapped in NatsEnvelope on the wire (envelope.payload_schema_version = 1). Sourced from docs/domain.md line 105 (EngineStatus BC). All money-typed fields are Decimal-str per Non-Custodial red line 0.4.

runner_id.description: Runner identity that emitted the snapshot; MUST match the enrolled runner.

spec_id.description: Deployment spec the snapshot is scoped to.

phase.description: Engine phase vocabulary (docs/domain.md §EngineStatus) — narrower than DeploymentStatus.phase because a snapshot only makes sense for a live engine.

order_count.description: In-flight order count as observed by the engine kernel.

open_notional.description: Absolute open-position notional; Decimal serialised as string (red line 0.4).

current_equity.description: Current equity = open_notional + Σ unrealized_pnl; Decimal-string.

peak_equity.description: High-water mark equity across the engine session; Decimal-string.

drawdown_pct.description: (peak_equity - current_equity) / peak_equity * 100; Decimal-string. The reconciler's local fallback breaker consumes this when arx is unreachable (red line 0.3).

sampled_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the engine sampled the fields; distinct from the envelope's `occurred_at` which marks emission time.
